// generated by UPnP-Terminal

// There are two parts: 1:: variables with default values
// and 2.: methods that can be called

with values (
    default NO_MEDIA_PRESENT
) define TransportState as string

with values (
    default OK
) define TransportStatus as string

with values (
    default 1
) define TransportPlaySpeed as string

with values (
    default 0
) define NumberOfTracks as ui4

with values (
    default 00:00:00
) define CurrentMediaDuration as string

define NextAVTransportURIMetaData as string

define CurrentTransportActions as string

define eventing LastChange as string

define A_ARG_TYPE_InstanceID as ui4

define A_ARG_TYPE_PrefetchURI as string

define A_ARG_TYPE_PrefetchURIMetaData as string

-- examples --
void def Stop(ui4 InstanceID);

void def Next(ui4 InstanceID);

def GetDeviceCapabilities(ui4 InstanceID):
  string varPlayMedia = __sub__0GetPlayMedia(...)
  string varRecMedia = __sub__0GetRecMedia(...)
  string varRecQualityModes = __sub__0GetRecQualityModes(...)

  return varInstanceID, varPlayMedia, varRecMedia, varRecQualityModes
